ddls:
CREATE TABLE "descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each description */,
  "sentence" TEXT /* Text-based description of the human action */,
  "principle_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the principles table */,
  "o_effect_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the effects table */,
  "o_react_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the reactions table */,
  "o_want_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the wants table */,
  "x_attr_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the attributes table */,
  "x_effect_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the effects table */,
  "x_intent_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the intents table */,
  "x_need_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the needs table */,
  "x_react_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the reactions table */,
  "x_want_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the wants table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the description was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the description was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptions_o_want_id FOREIGN KEY ("o_want_id") REFERENCES wants ("want_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptions_x_want_id FOREIGN KEY ("x_want_id") REFERENCES wants ("want_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptions_x_need_id FOREIGN KEY ("x_need_id") REFERENCES needs ("need_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptions_x_intent_id FOREIGN KEY ("x_intent_id") REFERENCES intents ("intent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptions_o_effect_id FOREIGN KEY ("o_effect_id") REFERENCES effects ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptions_x_attr_id FOREIGN KEY ("x_attr_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptions_principle_id FOREIGN KEY ("principle_id") REFERENCES principles ("principle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptions_x_react_id FOREIGN KEY ("x_react_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptions_x_effect_id FOREIGN KEY ("x_effect_id") REFERENCES effects ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_descriptions_o_react_id FOREIGN KEY ("o_react_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principles" (
  "principle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principle */,
  "principle_name" TEXT /* Name of the principle (e.g., friendliness) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the principle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the principle was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the principle was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("principle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., young, caring) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "effect_name" TEXT /* Name of the effect (e.g., none, positive, negative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the effect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the effect was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the effect was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reactions" (
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction */,
  "reaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the reaction (e.g., none, happy, sad) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wants" (
  "want_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each want or need */,
  "want_name" TEXT /* Name of the want or need (e.g., none, to get up) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the want or need */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the want or need was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the want or need was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("want_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intents" (
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intent */,
  "intent_name" TEXT /* Name of the intent (e.g., to have a snack, to be helpful) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the intent was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the intent was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "needs" (
  "need_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each need */,
  "need_name" TEXT /* Name of the need (e.g., none, to have a cat) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the need */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the need was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the need was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("need_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the descriptions table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the description was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_description_id FOREIGN KEY ("description_id") REFERENCES descriptions ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the descriptions table */,
  "principle_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the principles table */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the attributes table */,
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the effects table */,
  "reaction_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the reactions table */,
  "want_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the wants table */,
  "intent_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the intents table */,
  "need_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the needs table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_want_id FOREIGN KEY ("want_id") REFERENCES wants ("want_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_principle_id FOREIGN KEY ("principle_id") REFERENCES principles ("principle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_description_id FOREIGN KEY ("description_id") REFERENCES descriptions ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_effect_id FOREIGN KEY ("effect_id") REFERENCES effects ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_need_id FOREIGN KEY ("need_id") REFERENCES needs ("need_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_intent_id FOREIGN KEY ("intent_id") REFERENCES intents ("intent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("reaction_id") REFERENCES reactions ("reaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the research team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the research team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the research teams table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., team lead, researcher, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the descriptions table */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the research teams table */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., sentiment analysis, behavior pattern) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_description_id FOREIGN KEY ("description_id") REFERENCES descriptions ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
